category_sources: source_facts.description: Haskell source code suggestions; official HLint README describes a tool for suggesting improvements to Haskell code.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title uses HLint; source_facts.name is hlint.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface and includes installation, usage, FAQ, customization, and hacking notes.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo was empty; source_facts.homepage is the official ndmitchell/hlint repository, and Hackage lists the same source repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Haskell source suggestions; official README describes suggestions, configuration, CI usage, and reports.
